creator: george@m5p.com
text: The consensus of the 124 previous comments is use your choice of the net/realtek-re-kmod or net/realtek-re-kmod198 ports instead. The second has more of a track record and seems to work every time; the first is based apparently on Realtek's version "1100" driver and fails for some users but not for others.  Your mileage may vary.
